name: NORT — Flutter Dev Environment
postCreateCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 $HOME/flutter && echo 'export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/flutter/bin"' >> $HOME/.bashrc && $HOME/flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && $HOME/flutter/bin/flutter precache --web && $HOME/flutter/bin/flutter doctor
